name: Space Survival
short_description: A roguelike survival game in space. Stranded in space, you must fight to survive as long as you can! Dodge or destroy asteroids, collect ice shards to survive. Find power ups in from your ship, get out before they destabilize and explode! How long can you survive in space?
detailed_description: You are on a routine mission harvesting ice from asteroids, when suddenly your ship is hit by a high speed one and destroyed! Luckily you were outside of the ship when it happened.. Or was that luck? Now you are stranded in space alone! How long can you survive? You do have your grenade launcher and ice collecting gear and you can use the ice to power your life support, maybe you can even find some power ups from pieces of your old ship.. Just watch out for black holes!
